testcase.name: test_trial_balance_still_balanced

failure.message: AssertionError: trial balance not balanced: {'company_name': 'Skyward Sparks, LLC', 'as_of': '2026-07-15', 'rows': [{'code': '1010', 'name': 'Business Checking', 'debit': 43795.23, 'credit': 0.0}, {'code': '4000', 'name': 'Service Revenue', 'debit': 0.0, 'credit': 69800.0}, {'code': '6000', 'name': 'Meals', 'debit': 387.35, 'credit': 0.0}, {'code': '6100', 'name': 'Travel', 'debit': 2600.0, 'credit': 0.0}, {'code': '6200', 'name': 'Advertising & Marketing', 'debit': 1950.0, 'credit': 0.0}, {'code': '6250', 'name': 'Dues & Subscriptions', 'debit': 744.87, 'credit': 0.0}, {'code': '6300', 'name': 'Office Supplies', 'debit': 141.96, 'credit': 0.0}, {'code': '6400', 'name': 'Insurance', 'debit': 855.0, 'credit': 0.0}, {'code': '6500', 'name': 'Legal & Professional Fees', 'debit': 750.0, 'credit': 0.0}, {'code': '6600', 'name': 'Utilities', 'debit': 949.95, 'credit': 0.0}, {'code': '6700', 'name': 'Rent', 'debit': 1250.0, 'credit': 0.0}, {'code': '6800', 'name': 'Supplies & Materials', 'debit': 1650.2, 'credit': 0.0}, {'code': '6900', 'name': 'Repairs & Maintenance', 'debit': 770.64, 'credit': 0.0}, {'code': '7100', 'name': 'Software & SaaS', 'debit': 607.64, 'credit': 0.0}, {'code': '9999', 'name': 'Uncategorized Expense', 'debit': 13315.06, 'credit': 0.0}], 'total_debit': 69767.9, 'total_credit': 69800.0, 'balanced': False} assert False is True

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration7_gl_source.py:103: in test_trial_balance_still_balanced assert j["balanced"] is True, f"trial balance not balanced: {j}" E AssertionError: trial balance not balanced: {'company_name': 'Skyward Sparks, LLC', 'as_of': '2026-07-15', 'rows': [{'code': '1010', 'name': 'Business Checking', 'debit': 43795.23, 'credit': 0.0}, {'code': '4000', 'name': 'Service Revenue', 'debit': 0.0, 'credit': 69800.0}, {'code': '6000', 'name': 'Meals', 'debit': 387.35, 'credit': 0.0}, {'code': '6100', 'name': 'Travel', 'debit': 2600.0, 'credit': 0.0}, {'code': '6200', 'name': 'Advertising & Marketing', 'debit': 1950.0, 'credit': 0.0}, {'code': '6250', 'name': 'Dues & Subscriptions', 'debit': 744.87, 'credit': 0.0}, {'code': '6300', 'name': 'Office Supplies', 'debit': 141.96, 'credit': 0.0}, {'code': '6400', 'name': 'Insurance', 'debit': 855.0, 'credit': 0.0}, {'code': '6500', 'name': 'Legal & Professional Fees', 'debit': 750.0, 'credit': 0.0}, {'code': '6600', 'name': 'Utilities', 'debit': 949.95, 'credit': 0.0}, {'code': '6700', 'name': 'Rent', 'debit': 1250.0, 'credit': 0.0}, {'code': '6800', 'name': 'Supplies & Materials', 'debit': 1650.2, 'credit': 0.0}, {'code': '6900', 'name': 'Repairs & Maintenance', 'debit': 770.64, 'credit': 0.0}, {'code': '7100', 'name': 'Software & SaaS', 'debit': 607.64, 'credit': 0.0}, {'code': '9999', 'name': 'Uncategorized Expense', 'debit': 13315.06, 'credit': 0.0}], 'total_debit': 69767.9, 'total_credit': 69800.0, 'balanced': False} E assert False is True

testcase.name: test_balance_sheet_still_balanced

failure.message: AssertionError: BS not balanced: -32.1 assert False is True

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration7_gl_source.py:116: in test_balance_sheet_still_balanced assert j["balanced"] is True, f"BS not balanced: {j.get('imbalance')}" E AssertionError: BS not balanced: -32.1 E assert False is True
